About

Building at the intersection of intelligence and interface.

AI & ML Engineering student with a strong foundation in web development, machine learning, and data analytics. I enjoy turning ambiguous problems into working systems — from training models on real datasets to shipping interfaces people actually want to use.

Passionate about building real-world projects and solving problems that matter, whether that means recommendation engines, placement management systems, or polished frontend experiences.

Focused on continuous learning and steady career growth across AI and software engineering, with internship experience spanning data analytics, machine learning, and frontend development.
